product_overview: A web-based real-time chat and community platform where authenticated users can message friends, participate in community posts, browse live news, search and manage friends, and adjust personal settings. The app uses JWT-based auth, Socket.IO for realtime messaging, and an SPA-style conditional view state for navigation.
core_goals: Create an account and authenticate to the app
Send and receive real-time direct messages with friends and see typing/seen indicators
Find and add other users as friends and manage incoming friend requests
Post, comment, and react in community feeds and read AI-generated insights on posts
Browse a live, categorized news feed and open source articles
Search for users to send friend requests
Customize profile information and theme, and log out

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow existing users to authenticate with email and password and enter the authenticated app experience.
user_flows: Navigate to /#login -> Enter email address in email input -> Enter password in password input -> Submit login form -> Redirected to /#welcome
Navigate to /#login -> Enter invalid email or wrong password -> Submit login form -> See error toast on invalid credentials

features.name: User Registration (Signup)
features.description: Register a new account by providing name, email, password, and optional avatar URL, then proceed into the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /#signup -> Enter full name -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Optionally enter profile image URL -> Submit signup form -> Redirected to /#welcome
Navigate to /#signup -> Enter full name -> Enter email address already in use -> Enter password -> Submit signup form -> See error toast if email already taken

features.name: Welcome Screen
features.description: An animated greeting shown immediately after signup or login that orients the user before they enter the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /#welcome -> View animated welcome message with user name -> Choose to proceed into the app -> Redirected to /#dashboard
Navigate to /#welcome -> View animated welcome message -> Choose to open Community section -> Redirected to /#dashboard -> Switch to Community tab

features.name: Real-Time Direct Messaging (Chat)
features.description: Send and receive real-time messages with friends, view message history, and see typing and seen/sent indicators.
user_flows: Navigate to /#dashboard -> Switch to Chats tab -> Select a friend from the friends list to open a chat room -> Type a message in the message input box -> Press Enter to send message -> See the new message appear in the conversation with sent status

Navigate to /#dashboard -> Switch to Chats tab -> Select a friend from the friends list -> Start typing -> See typing indicator when other user is typing -> Send a message -> See message marked as seen when recipient views it

features.name: Friends List & Active Users
features.description: Display accepted friends and show which friends are currently online so users can start chats with active contacts.
user_flows: Navigate to /#dashboard -> See list of friends in the sidebar with online/offline status indicators -> Select an online friend to open a chat
Navigate to /#dashboard -> See offline friend in friends list -> Select offline friend to open chat and view message history

features.name: Search Users
features.description: Find other users by name and send friend requests to connect.
user_flows: Navigate to /#dashboard -> Switch to Search tab -> Type a user's name in the search box -> See matching users in the results list -> Send a friend request to a matching user
Navigate to /#dashboard -> Switch to Search tab -> Type a name that yields no matches -> See empty results or 'no matches' feedback

features.name: Friend Requests
features.description: Receive, view, and accept or reject incoming friend requests with real-time notifications.
user_flows: Navigate to /#dashboard -> See friend requests notification badge -> Open the friend requests panel -> Accept a pending friend request -> See the new friend appear in friends list
Navigate to /#dashboard -> Open the friend requests panel -> Reject a pending friend request -> See the request removed from the pending list

features.name: Community Feed (Posts & Comments)
features.description: Create and browse posts in named communities, like posts, and participate with threaded comments; view AI-generated summaries/insights on posts.
user_flows: Navigate to /#dashboard -> Switch to Community tab -> Create a post by entering title, content, and community name -> Submit the post -> See the new post appear in the community feed with AI insight
Navigate to /#dashboard -> Switch to Community tab -> Open a post -> Click Comment to expand comment section -> Write and submit a comment -> See comment appear under the post

features.name: Live News Thread
features.description: Browse a continuously updated feed of news articles categorized by topic and open original source articles.
user_flows: Navigate to /#dashboard -> Switch to Live News tab -> Browse news articles in a scrollable live feed -> Click Load More to fetch older articles
Navigate to /#dashboard -> Switch to Live News tab -> Tap an article in the feed -> Open the article's source URL

features.name: User Settings & Profile
features.description: Edit profile display name and avatar URL, toggle light/dark theme, and log out of the session.
user_flows: Navigate to /#dashboard -> Switch to Settings tab -> Edit display name and submit -> See updated display name reflected in the app

Navigate to /#dashboard -> Switch to Settings tab -> Paste a new profile image URL and save -> See updated profile image displayed -> Toggle between light and dark mode -> Click Logout -> Returned to /

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: A persistent left sidebar for switching between Chats, Community, Live News, Search, Friend Requests, and Settings and for surfacing notification badges and avatar.
user_flows: Navigate to /#dashboard -> Use the sidebar to switch between Chats, Community, Live News, Search, Friend Requests, and Settings -> See notification badges update on Friend Requests icon
Navigate to /#dashboard -> Observe app logo and current user avatar displayed in the sidebar -> Switch to a tab to change main panel content

routes.description: Root entry - shows Login, Signup, Welcome, or Dashboard based on auth state
Login view rendered conditionally in App
Signup/Registration view rendered conditionally in App
Animated welcome screen shown after login before entering the dashboard
Main application dashboard with sidebar tabs for chats, community, news, search, and settings

features.name: User Login
features.description: Users log in with email and password; JWT access token stored in localStorage; refresh token set as HttpOnly cookie
user_interactions: Enter email address in email input
Enter password in password input
Click Login button to submit form
See error toast on invalid credentials
Redirected to welcome screen on success

features.name: User Registration (Signup)
features.description: New users register with name, email, password, and optional avatar image URL
user_interactions: Enter full name
Enter email address
Enter password
Optionally enter profile image URL
Click Sign Up button
See error toast if email already taken
Redirected to welcome screen on success

features.name: Welcome Screen
features.description: Animated greeting shown to users after login/signup before entering the main dashboard
user_interactions: View animated welcome message with user name
Click "Start Chatting" to navigate to the Chats tab
Click "Community Feed" to navigate to the Community tab

features.name: Real-Time Direct Messaging (Chat)
features.description: Users can send and receive real-time messages with friends via Socket.IO; messages are stored in the DB; supports typing indicators, seen/sent status
user_interactions: Select a friend from the friends list to open a chat room
Type a message in the message input box
Press Enter or click Send to send a message
See typing indicator when other user is typing
Messages show sent/seen status
Scroll through message history

features.name: Friends List & Active Users
features.description: Shows a user's list of accepted friends and which ones are currently online
user_interactions: View list of friends in the sidebar
See online/offline status indicators
Click a friend to open a chat

features.name: Search Users
features.description: Search for other users by name to send friend requests
user_interactions: Click the Search tab in the sidebar
Type a user's name in the search box
See matching users in the results list
Click "Add Friend" to send a friend request

features.name: Friend Requests
features.description: View and manage incoming friend requests; accept or reject them; real-time notifications via Socket.IO
user_interactions: View the friend requests notification badge
Open the friend requests panel
Accept a pending friend request
Reject a pending friend request
Receive real-time friend request notification toast

features.name: Community Feed (Posts & Comments)
features.description: A Reddit-like community forum where users can create posts in named communities, comment on posts (threaded), like posts, and see AI-generated summaries
user_interactions: Click the Community tab in the sidebar
Click "Create Post" and fill in title, content, and community name
Submit the post
View posts in the feed with author, community, and AI insight
Click the like/reaction button on a post
Click "Comment" to expand comment section on a post
Write and submit a comment

features.name: Live News Thread
features.description: A live feed of news articles fetched periodically from RSS feeds, categorized by topic
user_interactions: Click the Live News tab in the sidebar
Browse news articles in a scrollable live feed
Click "Load More" to fetch older articles
Click an article to open the source URL

features.name: User Settings & Profile
features.description: Users can update their display name and profile picture URL, toggle dark/light theme, and log out
user_interactions: Click the Settings tab in the sidebar
Edit display name and submit
Paste a new profile image URL and save
Toggle between light and dark mode
Click Logout to clear session and return to login

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Persistent left sidebar with tab icons for switching between Chats, Community, Live News, Search, Friend Requests, and Settings
user_interactions: Click sidebar icons to switch between tabs
See notification badges on friend requests icon
View app logo and current user avatar

known_limitations.issue: Post likes are stored in-memory on the server (Map), not persisted in the database
known_limitations.impact: Likes reset on server restart and are not truly persistent

known_limitations.issue: Token refresh uses HttpOnly cookies which may not work cross-origin without SameSite=None + Secure settings
known_limitations.impact: Auth may silently fail in some browser/OS environments

known_limitations.issue: No dedicated route-based navigation (SPA uses conditional rendering with view state, not React Router)
known_limitations.impact: Deep linking and browser back/forward navigation not supported
